task: Advanced high-value task: Slo Burn-Rate Window False-Decision Cost Review. Scenario: a specialist reviewer found conflicting signals and needs an auditable explanation of which values matter for slo burn-rate window. Embedded packet: Records: R1 error_count=49 request_count=81 window_minutes=8; R2 error_count=58 request_count=77 window_minutes=11; R3 error_count=44 request_count=92 window_minutes=7. Remediation options: O1 changes error_count by -12% cost=80000; O2 changes request_count by -18% cost=97200; O3 changes window_minutes by -25% cost=56800; max_budget=122400. Rules and constraints: burn_rate=(error_rate)/(1-SLO); page when short and long windows exceed policy; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: design the output schema and acceptance checks an automated agent would need to reproduce the analysis. Deliver SLO_burn_4.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
